---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What user problem or workflow gap does this address?

## Proposed solution
The change you would like to see. Be concrete; sketch the surface area (CLI flag, API, UI element).

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.

## Scope and impact
- Affected modules:
- Migration / breaking change risk:
- Rough complexity estimate:

## Additional context
Links, prior art, or related issues.
